_comment: Metriques par cycle -- remplace METRICS.md. Ecrit par merlin-qa-lead apres chaque cycle.
notes: Cycle 6: Bundle optimization via Vite manual chunks (709KB monolith -> 3 chunks: index 148KB + minigames 60KB + three-core 529KB vendor). App code now 208KB (-70.7% from 709KB). +sang_froid minigame (shrinking safe zone, cursor tracking, drifting zone center, 10s timer, score = % time inside). +course minigame (QTE symbol chase, ogham symbols, 8 rounds x 1.5s, click target among decoys, score = hits/rounds * 100). +20 FastRoute cards for cercles_pierres+druides (equinox rituals, ley line convergences, time slips, ogham inscriptions, stargazing druids, sacred geometry, underground chambers, solstice fires, druide healers, singing stones). 9/14 minigames done. 106 card templates total (86+20). All caps respected (rep<=10, heal<=8, dmg<=5).
